extraction.one_line_summary: SCHACHMANN Max won Paris-Nice Stage 1 by outlasting TEUNS, ALAPHILIPPE in technical finale after bridging on penultimate climb
tactical_patterns: Alaphilippe took time bonuses at intermediate sprint 28km out, signaling GC ambitions despite windy crosswind setup earlier
Schachmann bridged solo to Teuns-Alaphilippe on steep cobbled climb, then outkicked both sprinters despite being climber type
Early crosswinds split peloton catching GC riders like Porte; Trek-Segafredo positioning vulnerability exposed before racing intensified
Teuns led over penultimate climb but shared pace with Alaphilippe, tactical error allowing Schachmann to rest before final sprint

rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Max: positive: bridged solo to two superior sprinters then outkicked both in wet conditions, unexpected finishing speed
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: collected time bonuses 28km out but couldn't win from 3-rider group, uncharacteristic sprint weakness
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: caught in early crosswind split requiring chase effort, Trek-Segafredo positioning breakdown cost energy
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: negative: abandoned after crash at 100km despite initial restart attempt, early season form indicator unreliable
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: negative: led over final climb with gap but shared workload allowing Schachmann bridge, tactical naivety cost stage
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: neutral: animated on penultimate climb but bridged riders immediately passed him, effort mistimed
